# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may

echo c - p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool
mkdir -p p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-Catalyst-Model-Tarantool/Makefile << '1151f19a1c7e48493dfd73a99f05ac18'
X# Created by: Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin@googlemail.com>
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=	Catalyst-Model-Tarantool
XPORTVERSION=	0.0.1
XCATEGORIES=	databases perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	CPAN
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-1
X
XMAINTAINER=	g.veniamin@googlemail.com
XCOMMENT=	Tarantool interface for Catalyst based application
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Catalyst-Runtime>=5.90001:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Catalyst-Runtime \
X		p5-MR-Tarantool>=0.0.24:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-MR-Tarantool
XRUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAN3=		Catalyst::Model::Tarantool.3
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
